citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:15pm on 1 May
2026. An adult on the property told the inspector neither the licensee, nor any responsible adult, was available to
accompany an inspection at that time. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a
violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:15pm on 1 May 
2026. An adult on the property told the inspector neither the licensee, nor any responsible adult, was available to 
accompany an inspection at that time. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a 
violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
